message:
test(vectordb): expand integration test suite with comprehensive coverage

Major expansion of the vectordb connector integration tests (~890 net
lines added). The new test cases cover the full spectrum of vectordb
operations including upsert, query, delete, collection management,
error handling, and edge cases for the connector's MCP tool interface.

This brings the vectordb connector test coverage in line with the
airtable connector, ensuring both connectors have thorough integration
test suites before the upcoming trace replay validation work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
